title: Continuous surface and depth estimation
abstract: Disclosed are systems, methods, and non-transitory computer-readable media for continuous surface and depth estimation. A continuous surface and depth estimation system determines the depth and surface normal of physical objects by using stereo vision limited within a predetermined window.
claims: 1. A method comprising: detecting a number of matching features within a first image and a second image that depict an object; determining the number of matching features is below a threshold value; identifying a known surface plane responsive to the determining that the number of matching features is below the threshold value; performing ray casting upon the known surface plane; determining a depth value for the object based on the ray casting; and causing presentation of media content based on the depth value.
